name: Framework improvement
about: Suggest a role, rubric, template, skill, or workflow improvement.

---

## Area

Name the role, rubric, template, skill, profile, or workflow.

## Problem

Describe the gap in current guidance.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the change you want.

## Source Or Evidence

Link source material, examples, playtest notes, or prior art.

## Out Of Scope

Name what this request should not change.
